items.title: Author Correction: Distinct virome compositions and lack of viral diversification indicate that viral spillover is a dead-end between the western honey bee and the common eastern bumblebee
items.author: Declan C. Schroeder
items.content: Author Correction: Distinct virome compositions and lack of viral diversification indicate that viral spillover is a dead-end between the western honey bee and the common eastern bumblebee

items.title: Structural insights into ligand recognition and G protein preferences across histamine receptors
items.author: Osamu Nureki
items.content: This study presents cryo-EM structures of H4R–Gi and H1R–Gi/Gs complexes, revealing distinct histamine recognition, activation mechanisms, and a critical determinant of G protein selectivity in H1R and H4R.

items.title: Author Correction: Parvalbumin neurons enhance temporal coding and reduce cortical noise in complex auditory scenes
items.author: Kamal Sen
items.content: Author Correction: Parvalbumin neurons enhance temporal coding and reduce cortical noise in complex auditory scenes

items.title: Bifidobacterium deficit in United States infants drives prevalent gut dysbiosis
items.author: Stephanie J. Culler
items.content: The My Baby Biome Study demonstrates that three gut microbiome community clusters exist in infants in the United States. These compositions vary on the prevalence and abundance of Bifidobacterium and impact risk for the development of atopic disease.

items.title: Hippocampal systems for event encoding and sequencing during ongoing narrative comprehension
items.author: Won Mok Shim
items.content: Distinct hippocampal-cortical systems support the encoding and sequencing of narrative events during ongoing comprehension, revealing how episodic memory integrates past and present information into coherent narratives.

items.title: Super-enhancers orchestrate transcriptional dysregulation and metabolic reprogramming in uveal melanoma
items.author: Ai Zhuang
items.content: Super-enhancers drive TFAP2A-mediated metabolic reprogramming and SLC7A8 oncogene activation in uveal melanoma, identifying epigenetic vulnerabilities for precision therapy.

items.title: Deciphering spatial scales of connectivity in a subsidy-dependent coastal ecosystem
items.author: Kyle C. Cavanaugh
items.content: Spatial connectivity between kelp forests and sandy beaches, in terms of kelp subsidies, is highly localized and primarily dependent on kelp canopy biomass. However, attributes of the beach including width and orientation are also important.

items.title: Metabolic acclimation to warming links unexpected immune activation and sexual dimorphism attenuation in Xenopus tropicalis
items.author: Jianping Jiang
items.content: A transcriptome atlas of Xenopus tropicalis reveals the role of the immune-reproductive trade-off mediated by metabolic reprogramming in maintaining homeostasis from the perspective of inter-organ crosstalk.
